name: ASUS ZenWiFi BT10 Whole Home Mesh WiFi System - Tri-band WiFi 7 802.11be - 6 GHz WiFi - Coverage up to 6000 sq. ft. (2pk) - Dual 10G WAN/LAN Ethernet Ports - 4G LTE and 5G Mobile Tethering (BT10 2PK)
